name: deep-research
description: Stage-first deep research recipe: parallel source research, claim verification foreach, and final cited synthesis with optional ask continuation for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Research the external source landscape for the runtime task: papers, benchmark methodology posts, official docs, implementation notes, and credible community discussions. Use web_search to discover sources, fetch_content for ordinary URLs, and scrapling_fetch only as a fallback for known URLs that fetch poorly or require JS/selector extraction. Return JSON only with a claims array of 4-6 concise, non-overlapping string claims, each grounded in one or more source URLs. Include source URL/title/year in each claim string when possible.

Research technical details, methods, metrics, or mechanisms needed to answer the runtime task. Prefer source-backed methodology, concrete measurements, implementation details, and experimental design over generic commentary. Return JSON only with a claims array of 4-6 concise, non-overlapping string claims with source URL/title/year when possible.

Research risks, limitations, costs, failure modes, uncertainty, and disputed interpretations relevant to the runtime task. Return JSON only with a claims array of 3-5 concise, non-overlapping string claims with source URL/title/year when possible.

each.prompt: Verify this claim against source-backed external evidence: ${item}. Prefer primary sources and independent corroboration. Use fetch_content for URLs and scrapling_fetch only as a fallback for known URLs that fetch poorly. Return JSON only with keys claim, status, evidence, and caveats. Preserve the original claim text in claim. status must be exactly one of: verified, partially_supported, unsupported, conflicting. evidence must be an array of objects with source, url, dateOrYear, quote, and relevance. Use status=unsupported when source evidence is absent.

stages.prompt: Use Source Stage Context and the runtime task to produce a cited finalReport with a compact summary, key verified claims, recommendations or answer structure appropriate to the task, caveats, and remaining risks. Include source URLs/titles in the report. Do not create follow-up work for minor wording gaps; include a bounded nextFlowSpec only when a blocking evidence gap remains. Otherwise omit nextFlowSpec.
